name: low_resolution
description: Posts with files with low resolutions. (500x500 or smaller)

name: high_resolution
description: Posts with files with high resolutions. (1600x1200 or larger)

name: very_high_resolution
description: Posts with files with very high resolutions. (3200x2400 or larger)

name: extremely_high_resolution
description: Posts with files with massive resolutions. (10000x10000 or larger)

name: long
description: Posts with files with very tall or wide images.

name: large_filesize
description: Posts with files with big filesizes. (5 MB or larger)

name: extremely_large_filesize
description: Posts with files with massive filesizes. (15 MB or larger)

name: potential_duplicate
description: Posts that may be a duplicate.
